hero.title: Generate publishable data-collection scenarios with AI and templates
hero.description:
AI AgentFactory helps teams start from one prompt or a proven template, then generate forms, Typeform-like flows, submissions, Webhook delivery and basic analytics.
Capture real business data first, then expand into Agent, workflow and deeper automation capabilities.

announcement.label: MVP
announcement.title: Start with a runnable form template

hero.tip: Current focus: form generation, templates, page Agent, Webhook and submissions

branding.title: The current technical foundation already covers website, console, auth, payments, i18n and data access

introduce.name: introduce
introduce.title: What AI AgentFactory is
introduce.label: Positioning
introduce.description: This is not a single AI tool. It is an enterprise platform foundation built around generation, runtime, governance, integration, operations and delivery.

items.title: AI Scene Generation
items.description: Start from natural language and generate scene structure, forms, pages and workflow drafts.

items.title: GenUI and Low-Code Collaboration
items.description: Use dynamic interfaces, iterative editing and human confirmation to reduce delivery lead time.

items.title: Enterprise Governance Loop
items.description: Cover versions, rollout, exceptions, knowledge base and AI operations for controlled releases.

benefit.name: benefit
benefit.title: Why this platform fits fragmented business scenarios
benefit.label: Core Value
benefit.description: The goal is not a single feature boost. The goal is to improve the whole chain from requirement intake to business delivery.

items.title: Move Faster from Requirement to Page
items.description: Use AI scene generation and GenUI to speed up forms, pages and workflow decomposition while reducing repetitive delivery work.

items.title: Make Workflows and Integrations More Reliable
items.description: Skill orchestration, protocol adapters and standardized error handling turn integration work into reusable platform assets.

items.title: Keep Release and Operations Governable
items.description: Versions, rollout, exception center, knowledge base and audit controls reduce the risks of enterprise delivery.

usage.name: usage
usage.title: How one business scenario lands on the platform
usage.description: From requirement intake to release and operations, keep one connected path instead of switching between disconnected tools.

items.title: Capture the Business Need
items.description: Clarify collection steps, approvals, notifications, OCR, reports and field requirements.

items.title: Generate the Page and Workflow
items.description: Use AI scene generation, GenUI and Skill orchestration to produce the first runnable version quickly.

items.title: Integrate and Govern the Release
items.description: Connect systems, validate dependencies, manage rollout and configure multi-end distribution.

items.title: Close the Loop Through Operations
items.description: Feed exceptions, knowledge and AI operations back into the platform for continuous improvement.

pricing.name: pricing
pricing.label: Delivery Modes
pricing.title: Delivery Modes
pricing.description: The homepage currently focuses on capabilities and scenarios. Solution discussion is handled in the CTA.

faq.name: faq
faq.label: FAQ
faq.title: Frequently Asked Questions About AI AgentFactory
faq.description: The homepage answers positioning and rollout questions first. Detailed solution design comes next.

items.title: What kind of product is this?
items.description: It is not a single AI feature. It is a platform for generating, running, governing and integrating fragmented enterprise business scenarios.

items.title: Who is it for?
items.description: It fits insurance, fintech, public sector and enterprise digital teams, especially for material collection, approvals, expense submission, claim intake and document-heavy workflows.

items.title: How is it different from low-code or forms tools?
items.description: It combines AI scene generation, GenUI, Skill orchestration, integrations, release governance, exception management and AI operations instead of only providing page assembly.

items.title: Is the current codebase the final product?
items.description: No. The current `Code/` directory is still closer to a technical foundation and SaaS template than the final scene platform product.

items.title: What delivery models are supported?
items.description: SaaS, dedicated tenant and private deployment are all in scope, depending on compliance, data isolation and project constraints.

items.title: What should happen next?
items.description: The best next step is to map the current codebase to the PRD and then evolve the platform modules incrementally instead of rebuilding everything from scratch.

cta.name: cta
cta.title: Use today’s technical foundation to grow into the real enterprise scene platform
cta.description: The next step is architecture mapping, module decomposition and implementation of the platform-specific scenarios beyond the homepage.

brand.title: AI AgentFactory
brand.description: An AI platform for generating, running, governing and integrating fragmented enterprise scenarios.
